messages.content: You are a precise Python coding assistant. Output ONLY a single fenced ```python code block containing exactly one function definition named two_sum(nums, target). No prose, no explanation, no example usage outside the code block.

Write a Python function `two_sum(nums, target)` that returns a list of the two 0-based indices of the two distinct elements in `nums` that add up to `target`. Assume exactly one valid pair exists and you must not reuse the same index twice. Return ONLY a fenced python code block with the function definition — no tests, no explanation, no extra text.
